title: Office Relocation
transcript:
Man: Hi Sarah, I heard the company is planning to move to a new office. Do you know when that's happening?
Woman: Yes, the lease for this building ends in June, so we're aiming to complete the move by the end of May.
Man: That's sooner than I thought. Where is the new location?
Woman: It's in the Riverside Business District, about fifteen minutes from here by train.
Man: Will everyone be moving, or are some teams staying here?
Woman: All departments will relocate, but the IT team will work from this location for an extra week to ensure a smooth transition of the servers.

questions.stem: When does the company plan to complete the office move?
options: By the end of the year
questions.explanation: The woman states they are aiming to complete the move by the end of May.

questions.stem: How far is the new office from the current location?
questions.explanation: The woman says the new location is about fifteen minutes from here by train.

questions.stem: Why will the IT team stay at the current office longer?
options: To ensure a smooth server transition
questions.explanation: The woman mentions the IT team will stay an extra week to ensure a smooth transition of the servers.
